notes:
Call & Grid Stability Update

  • Cleaner 1to1 transitions: Closing or leaving during ringing now cleans invitation state more reliably.
  • Grid improvements: With 2 participants, the other side stays dominant while your preview appears as PiP.
  • Screen-share cursors on correct monitor: Cursor overlay now uses display metadata for more accurate monitor targeting.
  • Avatar resilience: Temporary profile image load failures now retry once before fallback.
